message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column.rolling_window_sum parity (frankenpandas-6919)

Adds a Column-level sliding-window sum matching
pd.Series.rolling(window).sum():

- rolling_window_sum(window, min_periods) walks size-`window` windows
  ending at each position and sums non-missing numeric values.
- Positions whose window contains fewer than min_periods non-missing
  values emit Null(NaN).
- window=0 returns an all-null Float64 column the same length as the
  input (pandas raises; our policy is fail-soft here since the higher
  Series layer already validates).
- Non-numeric values in the window yield a TypeError — the caller
  decides whether to cast first.

Result dtype is always Float64 (matches pandas' rolling arithmetic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
